title: Maersk India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Maersk India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Maersk India family as a Warehouse Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Maersk India:
Maersk India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maersk India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
